text:
<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.
<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: E-Commerce
Available data fields: revenue, traffic_source, cart_events, returns, date
Key metrics to track: Average Order Value, Customer Lifetime Value, Revenue by Category
User goals: manage return rates, analyze traffic sources, analyze conversion funnel
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This E-Commerce dashboard is designed to help users manage return rates and analyze traffic sources. It focuses on Average Order Value, Customer Lifetime Value, Revenue by Category using data from fields such as revenue, traffic_source, cart_events.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Average Order Value",
      "user_task": "patterns over time/categories",
      "recommended_chart": "heatmap",
      "rationale": "Bar charts allow quick comparison across discrete categories."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Customer Lifetime Value",
      "user_task": "trend over time",
      "recommended_chart": "line chart",
      "rationale": "Drill-down interactions let users move from summary to detail without leaving the dashboard."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Revenue by Category",
      "user_task": "composition/share",
      "recommended_chart": "stacked bar chart or donut chart",
      "rationale": "Bar charts allow quick comparison across discrete categories."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Left panel: KPI cards (vertical). Right panel: main chart on top, detail table below.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Neutral grey base with accent colors per category. Consistent legend placement.",
  "interactions": [
    "Toggle between chart types",
    "Export to CSV button",
    "Zoom on time axis"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Filtering controls empower users to focus on relevant subsets of data.",
    "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation."
  ]
}

<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.
<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: Finance
Available data fields: department, budget, profit, account, date
Key metrics to track: EBITDA, Budget Variance, Revenue vs. Cost
User goals: review debt levels, identify cost overruns, analyze expense categories
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This Finance dashboard is designed to help users review debt levels and identify cost overruns. It focuses on EBITDA, Budget Variance, Revenue vs. Cost using data from fields such as department, budget, profit.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "EBITDA",
      "user_task": "main KPIs",
      "recommended_chart": "KPI cards",
      "rationale": "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Budget Variance",
      "user_task": "patterns over time/categories",
      "recommended_chart": "heatmap",
      "rationale": "KPI cards provide immediate visibility into the most critical metrics."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Revenue vs. Cost",
      "user_task": "category comparison",
      "recommended_chart": "bar chart",
      "rationale": "Donut/stacked bar charts show part-to-whole relationships clearly."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Top: KPI cards row. Center: two charts side by side. Bottom: trend line chart full width.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Brand-aligned primary color for main metrics; muted tones for secondary data.",
  "interactions": [
    "Region/department dropdown filter",
    "Cross-filter between charts",
    "Toggle between chart types"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting.",
    "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation."
  ]
}

<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.
<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: HR
Available data fields: training_status, hire_date, exit_date, satisfaction_score, department
Key metrics to track: Employee Turnover Rate, Absenteeism Rate, Time to Hire
User goals: measure employee satisfaction, track headcount changes, monitor turnover trends
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This HR dashboard is designed to help users measure employee satisfaction and track headcount changes. It focuses on Employee Turnover Rate, Absenteeism Rate, Time to Hire using data from fields such as training_status, hire_date, exit_date.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Employee Turnover Rate",
      "user_task": "category comparison",
      "recommended_chart": "bar chart",
      "rationale": "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Absenteeism Rate",
      "user_task": "relationship/correlation",
      "recommended_chart": "scatter plot",
      "rationale": "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Time to Hire",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Scatter plots expose correlations and outliers between two variables."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Top row: KPI cards. Middle: main chart (full width). Bottom: supporting charts side by side.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Brand-aligned primary color for main metrics; muted tones for secondary data.",
  "interactions": [
    "Cross-filter between charts",
    "Highlight on selection",
    "Toggle between chart types"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting.",
    "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
  ]
}

<|system|>
You are a dashboard design assistant. You generate structured, practical, and heuristic-aligned dashboard design recommendations.

Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: Marketing
Available data fields: campaign_name, clicks, leads, date, spend
Key metrics to track: Brand Awareness Score, Lead Conversion Rate, Email Open Rate
User goals: analyze email engagement, optimize ad spend, measure brand reach
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This Marketing dashboard is designed to help users analyze email engagement and optimize ad spend. It focuses on Brand Awareness Score, Lead Conversion Rate, Email Open Rate using data from fields such as campaign_name, clicks, leads.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Brand Awareness Score",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Lead Conversion Rate",
      "user_task": "trend over time",
      "recommended_chart": "line chart",
      "rationale": "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Email Open Rate",
      "user_task": "main KPIs",
      "recommended_chart": "KPI cards",
      "rationale": "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Single-page layout: KPI cards at top, heatmap in center, bar chart and line chart at bottom.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Blue-green palette for positive trends; red for negative deviations. Clear axis labels with units.",
  "interactions": [
    "Cross-filter between charts",
    "Drill-down on chart click",
    "Toggle between chart types"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Scatter plots expose correlations and outliers between two variables.",
    "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
  ]
}
